# Registry Visibility and Access Control API reference

-> **Note:** Registry visibility and usage control features are available in HCP Terraform Premium tier. Ensure that the registry visibility feature is enabled for your organization before using these endpoints.

## Overview

The HCP Terraform Registry Visibility API enables you to control:

- **Discovery**: Which registry artifacts (modules, providers, component configs) are visible to different teams and projects
- **Usage**: Which artifacts can be used by specific workspaces and projects
- **Governance**: Fine-grained access control based on project tags and organizational policies

This API helps you implement governance policies and security controls by preventing unauthorized use of registry artifacts in your infrastructure deployments.

The following table lists all the endpoints for managing registry visibility and access control in your organization's private registry:

| Method | Path | Action |
|--------|------|--------|
| PATCH | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-usage-control` | Enable or disable registry usage control for the organization. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-usage-control` | Retrieve the current registry usage control status for the organization. |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags` | Assign a project tag to a registry module (artifact-level access control). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags` | List project tags assigned to a registry module. |
| DELETE | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags/:project_tag_id` | Remove a project tag assignment from a registry module. |
| POST | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/project-tags` | Assign a project tag to a registry provider. |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules?filter[project-id]=:project_id` | List registry modules accessible to a specific project (based on project tags). |
| GET | `/organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/access-restrictions` | Retrieve access restrictions for a registry artifact (which projects are allowed). |


## Visibility and Access Control Concepts

Registry visibility is controlled through:

1. **Project Tags**: Assigned to registry artifacts to categorize them (e.g., `project:platform`, `team:infrastructure`)
2. **Project-Level Tags**: Assigned to projects within your organization to define access permissions
3. **Usage Control**: When enabled, workspaces can only use modules/providers that have at least one matching project tag

## Enable Registry Usage Control

[](#enable-registry-usage-control)

Enables or disables registry usage control for an organization. When enabled, workspaces will only be able to use modules and providers that are tagged for their project.

`PATCH /organizations/:organization_name/registry-usage-control`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization to configure. |

-> **Note:** This endpoint requires admin permissions. You must access it with a user token or team token with admin privileges.

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "organization"`) | Successfully updated registry usage control setting |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid parameter value |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to configure registry settings |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Organization not found |

### Request Body

[](#request-body)

This PATCH endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string | Must be `"organizations"`. |
| `data.attributes.registry-usage-control-enabled` | boolean | Whether to enable registry usage control for the organization. When `true`, workspace usage of registry artifacts will be restricted based on project tag assignments. |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "organizations",
    "attributes": {
      "registry-usage-control-enabled": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request PATCH \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-usage-control
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "org-abc123",
    "type": "organizations",
    "attributes": {
      "name": "my-organization",
      "registry-usage-control-enabled": true,
      "created-at": "2020-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "updated-at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization"
    }
  }
}
```

## Get Registry Usage Control Status

[](#get-registry-usage-control-status)

Retrieves the current registry usage control status for an organization.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-usage-control`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "organization"`) | Successfully retrieved usage control status |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Organization not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-1)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-usage-control
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-1)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "org-abc123",
    "type": "organizations",
    "attributes": {
      "name": "my-organization",
      "registry-usage-control-enabled": true,
      "created-at": "2020-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "updated-at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    }
  }
}
```

## Assign Project Tags to Registry Artifacts

[](#assign-project-tags-to-registry-artifacts)

Assigns project tags to registry artifacts (modules, providers, or component configs) to control their visibility and usage. Project tags are inherited by all versions of the artifact.

`POST /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization that owns the artifact. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. For private registries, this should be `private`. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the artifact. |
| `:name` | The name of the artifact. |
| `:system` | For modules: the provider system (e.g., `aws`). For providers: omit this parameter. |

-> **Note:** This endpoint requires the `write:modules` scope and registry management permissions.

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [201](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/201) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "project-tags"`) | Successfully assigned project tag |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid project or artifact |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to manage artifact visibility |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Artifact or project not found |
| [422](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/422) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Malformed request body or duplicate project tag |

### Request Body

[](#request-body-1)

This POST endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string | Must be `"project-tags"`. |
| `data.relationships.project.data.id` | string | The ID of the project to associate with this artifact. |
| `data.relationships.project.data.type` | string | Must be `"projects"`. |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload-1)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "project-tags",
    "relationships": {
      "project": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prj-abc123",
          "type": "projects"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-2)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request POST \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/project-tags
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-2)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "pt-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h",
    "type": "project-tags",
    "attributes": {
      "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "registry-module": {
        "data": {
          "id": "mod-kwt1cBiX2SdDz38w",
          "type": "registry-modules"
        }
      },
      "project": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prj-abc123",
          "type": "projects"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/project-tags/pt-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h"
    }
  }
}
```

## List Project Tags for a Registry Artifact

[](#list-project-tags-for-a-registry-artifact)

Lists all projects that have access to a registry artifact through project tag assignments.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the artifact. |
| `:name` | The name of the artifact. |
| `:system` | The provider system or artifact type. |

### Query Parameters

[](#query-parameters)

This endpoint supports pagination [with standard URL query parameters](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#query-parameters).

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `page[number]` | **Optional.** Page number for pagination. |
| `page[size]` | **Optional.** Number of results per page. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "project-tags"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Artifact not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-3)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/project-tags
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-3)

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "pt-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h",
      "type": "project-tags",

      },

    "first": "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/project-tags?page%5Bnumber%5D=1&page%5Bsize%5D=20",
```

## Remove Project Tag from a Registry Artifact

[](#remove-project-tag-from-a-registry-artifact)

Removes a project tag assignment from a registry artifact, revoking access for that project.

`DELETE /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/project-tags/:project_tag_id`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the artifact. |
| `:name` | The name of the artifact. |
| `:system` | The provider system. |
| `:project_tag_id` | The ID of the project tag assignment to delete. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [204](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/204) | Empty response | Successfully removed the project tag |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized to manage artifact visibility |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Project tag not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-4)

```bash
curl \
  --request DELETE \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/project-tags/pt-1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h
```

## Assign Project Tags to Registry Providers

[](#assign-project-tags-to-registry-providers)

Assigns project tags to registry providers to control their visibility and usage.

`POST /organizations/:organization_name/registry-providers/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/project-tags`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization that owns the provider. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the provider. |
| `:name` | The name of the provider. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [201](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/201) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "project-tags"`) | Successfully assigned project tag |
| [400](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/400) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Invalid project or provider |
| [403](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/403) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | User not authorized |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Provider or project not found |

### Request Body

[](#request-body-2)

This POST endpoint requires a JSON object with the following properties as a request payload.

| Key path | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data.type` | string | Must be `"project-tags"`. |
| `data.relationships.project.data.id` | string | The ID of the project to associate with this provider. |
| `data.relationships.project.data.type` | string | Must be `"projects"`. |

### Sample Payload

[](#sample-payload-2)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "type": "project-tags",
    "relationships": {
      "project": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prj-abc123",
          "type": "projects"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-5)

```bash
curl \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json" \
  --request POST \
  --data @payload.json \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-providers/private/my-organization/custom-provider/project-tags
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-4)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "pt-3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j",
    "type": "project-tags",
    "attributes": {
      "created_at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "registry-provider": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prov-xyz789",
          "type": "registry-providers"
        }
      },
      "project": {
        "data": {
          "id": "prj-abc123",
          "type": "projects"
        }
      }
    },
    "links": {
      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-providers/private/my-organization/custom-provider/project-tags/pt-3c4d5e6f7g8h9i0j"
    }
  }
}
```

## Query Registry Artifacts by Project Access

[](#query-registry-artifacts-by-project-access)

Lists registry modules that are accessible to a specific project based on project tag assignments.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules?filter[project-id]=:project_id`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:project_id` | The ID of the project to filter by. |

### Query Parameters

[](#query-parameters-1)

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `filter[project-id]` | **Required.** The project ID to filter artifacts that are accessible to this project. |
| `page[number]` | **Optional.** Page number for pagination. |
| `page[size]` | **Optional.** Number of results per page. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "registry-modules"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Project or organization not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-6)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules?filter[project-id]=prj-abc123"
```

## Get Registry Artifact Access Restrictions

[](#get-registry-artifact-access-restrictions)

Retrieves the access restrictions for a registry artifact, showing which projects can use it.

`GET /organizations/:organization_name/registry-modules/:registry_name/:namespace/:name/:system/access-restrictions`

| Parameter | Description |
|---|---|
| `:organization_name` | The name of the organization. |
| `:registry_name` | The name of the registry. |
| `:namespace` | The namespace of the module. |
| `:name` | The name of the module. |
| `:system` | The provider system. |

| Status | Response | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| [200](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/200) | [JSON API document](/hashicorp/web-unified-docs/blob/main/terraform/cloud-docs/api-docs#json-api-documents) (`type: "access-restrictions"`) | The request was successful |
| [404](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404) | [JSON API error object](http://jsonapi.org/format/#error-objects) | Artifact not found |

### Sample Request

[](#sample-request-7)

```bash
curl \
  --request GET \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  https://app.terraform.io/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/access-restrictions
```

### Sample Response

[](#sample-response-6)

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "ar-abc123",
    "type": "access-restrictions",
    "attributes": {
      "is-restricted": true,
      "allowed-projects": [
        {
          "id": "prj-abc123",
          "name": "Project Alpha"
        },
        {
          "id": "prj-def456",
          "name": "Project Beta"
        }
      ],
      "restricted-project-count": 2,
      "created-at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z",
      "updated-at": "2026-06-12T15:30:00Z"
    },
    "relationships": {
      "registry-module": {
        "data": {
          "id": "mod-kwt1cBiX2SdDz38w",
          "type": "registry-modules"
        }
      }

      "self": "/api/v2/organizations/my-organization/registry-modules/private/my-organization/vpc/aws/access-restrictions"
    }
  }
}
```

## Errors and Usage Control Validation

When registry usage control is enabled and a workspace attempts to use a restricted registry artifact, the following error is returned:

### Error Response for Restricted Artifact Usage

[](#error-response-for-restricted-artifact-usage)

```
Error: This workspace does not have access to [module/provider name]. Please review your project's registry access.
```

This error indicates that:
- The workspace's project does not have access to the requested registry artifact
- Registry usage control is enabled in the organization
- The artifact requires explicit project tag assignment for access

To resolve this error:
1. Contact your organization administrator
2. Request the artifact to be tagged for your project
3. Alternatively, request access to the artifact through your project settings

### Usage Control Validation

Registry usage control validation occurs at:
- **Plan time**: During `terraform init` and `terraform plan`
- **Apply time**: During `terraform apply` for stacks

The validation ensures that workspaces cannot reference modules or providers that are not authorized for their project.
